description: SQL migration safety advisor fixture: DROP TABLE irreversibility, NOT NULL without DEFAULT locking risk on large tables, clean migration approval, CREATE INDEX without CONCURRENTLY ShareLock, column rename application impact, and no-content error handling. All SQL is synthetic against fictional tables.
notes: risk_tier=high: false-negative on a DROP TABLE or locking-risk finding is a high-severity evaluation failure
All cases target PostgreSQL; engine is stated explicitly in each input for evaluator context
Case 2 (NOT NULL without default) is the highest-value case — it catches the most common production incident pattern
Case 3 (clean approval) uses golden evaluator at threshold 0.70 — primary signal is approval without fabricated concerns
Case 5 (column rename) tests application-coordination awareness beyond pure DDL safety — agents that only check SQL syntax will fail
Hashes: re-run `agentcarousel bundle pack fixtures/bundles/database-migration-advisor` after file changes
open_items: OI-001: Add MySQL variant of Case 4 (ALGORITHM=INPLACE vs COPY) to cover non-PostgreSQL users
OI-002: Add judge evaluator case for nuanced NOT VALID / VALIDATE CONSTRAINT remediation guidance
OI-003: Advance to stable certification track after 5 carousel runs with <10% rubric variance
